narrative.description: Mega Man X (1993) on SNES is a acclaimed action-platformer title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Engage core systems repeatedly to overcome challenges and advance.
